(8) Rate of dividend paid.
(Q) Performance vis-à-vis objects:
sentence_window:
(6) Date of allotment and date of credit of securities to the demat account. (7) Date of completion of the project, where object of the issue was financing the
project. (8) Rate of dividend paid.
(Q) Performance vis-à-vis objects: (1) Issuer:
(a) A list of all the public/rights issues made during the preceding five years,
along with the year of issue. (b) Details of non-achievement of objects, with quantification of shortfall and
delays for such public/rights issues.
